overall.description: A cinematic first-person walkthrough of a traditional Japanese temple interior, transitioning from a narrow corridor with illuminated display cases to an open zen rock garden courtyard surrounded by two-story wooden architecture, and finally into dimly lit walkways. The footage showcases high-end game engine rendering with atmospheric lighting and detailed wooden textures.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a narrow wooden corridor flanked by glass display cases with red interior lighting

entered.detail: long narrow corridor with dark wooden walls and ceiling
rectangular display cases with red internal lighting containing decorative objects
rectangular display cases with red internal lighting containing decorative objects
polished wooden plank flooring with red accent strips
rectangular illuminated panels recessed in the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow enclosed corridor with dark wooden architecture. Glass display cases with red interior lighting line both sides, showcasing decorative objects. The camera moves forward along the polished wooden floor toward a distant exit, with warm artificial lighting from ceiling panels above.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from corridor to open zen garden courtyard

events.description: corridor opens into large interior courtyard with zen rock garden and two-story wooden architecture

agents.ego_description: turning right while exiting the narrow corridor to enter the spacious courtyard

entered.detail: open courtyard with raked sand and large rock formations
massive dark boulders arranged in the sand garden
large red circular wall hanging with black symbol on the far stone wall
upper level wooden walkway with railings overlooking the garden
upper level wooden walkway with railings overlooking the garden
textured stone wall behind the red banner with decorative elements

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right and exits the corridor, revealing a dramatic transition to a spacious interior courtyard featuring a traditional zen rock garden. Large black boulders sit in raked sand, surrounded by two-story wooden balconies. A prominent red circular banner hangs on the far stone wall, illuminated by atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior zen rock garden with surrounding wooden walkways

events.description: camera circles around the central rock formation while moving through the garden

agents.ego_description: walking through the zen garden, circling around the large rock formations and observing the raked sand patterns

entered.detail: carefully raked white sand with circular patterns around the rocks
small rectangular illuminated lanterns along the walkway edge
low wooden railings bordering the sand garden

segments.scene_description: Moving through the open courtyard, the camera explores the zen garden by circling the massive rock formations. The raked sand patterns are clearly visible around the rocks. Floor lanterns line the wooden walkway to the right, while the two-story wooden structure surrounds the space. The red banner shifts to the right as the camera moves.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden walkway with floor lanterns along the courtyard edge

events.description: entering darker corridor section with only floor lanterns and minimal ambient light

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden walkway on the courtyard's edge, moving into progressively darker areas

entered.detail: dimly lit covered walkway with dark wooden walls and ceiling
rectangular floor lanterns with warm white light placed at intervals
translucent bamboo screen illuminated from behind

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the edge of the garden into a darker covered walkway. The space becomes dimly lit, with only rectangular floor lanterns providing warm illumination. The rocks and sand garden fall behind as the camera progresses along the wooden deck, passing a bamboo screen wall on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor with traditional stone lantern

events.description: camera slows and stops while approaching the illuminated stone lantern

agents.ego_description: approaching and focusing on a traditional stone lantern, slowing to observe the details

entered.detail: classical Japanese stone lantern with glowing light inside, detailed stone carving
rough stone wall surface next to the lantern

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the camera moves through a narrow dark corridor and approaches a beautifully illuminated traditional stone lantern. The camera slows to focus on the lantern's details against the dark wooden walls, ending with a close-up view of the stone carving and warm internal light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, artificially lit corridor into a spacious zen courtyard before receding into the dim shadows of a traditional temple. It begins by gliding through a narrow wooden hallway lined with red-lit glass display cases, moving forward until the path opens to the right. As the camera exits the corridor, the scene expands into a bright interior courtyard featuring a raked sand garden with massive black boulders and a prominent red circular banner on the far wall. The camera then circles these rock formations and passes floor lanterns along a wooden deck, before the environment shifts back into a dimly lit covered walkway bordered by a bamboo screen. Finally, the view narrows into a dark corridor, slowing to a stop as it focuses on the intricate carvings and warm glow of a single stone lantern.
